finance.err.date_format: Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD, got '{payload}'
finance.err.doc_id_invalid: doc_id must look like an Eigenpulse doc id, got '{payload}'
finance.err.tfr_not_editable: Transfer rows are immutable; delete and re-create instead
finance.err.tfr_requires_transfer: Use the transfer endpoint/form for transfers; one-leg transactions only accept exp/inc
finance.err.tfr_category_missing: Category TFR is missing. Create it in category management
finance.err.tfr_pair_multiple_partners: Transfer-pair links point at multiple distinct partners; manual repair required
finance.err.tfr_pair_partner_missing: Transfer partner '{payload}' is missing; data drift detected, manual repair required before delete
finance.err.amount_must_be_finite: amount must be a finite number
finance.err.amount_sign_invalid: for /api/v1/fin/txn, exp amounts must be negative and inc amounts must be positive
finance.err.budget_periods_same: source and target periods must differ
finance.err.merchant_too_long: merchant must be at most {payload} characters
finance.err.note_too_long: note must be at most {payload} characters
finance.err.linked_doc_id_invalid: linked_doc_id must look like an Eigenpulse doc id, got '{payload}'
finance.err.account_code_format: code must be 2..=16 chars, uppercase letters / digits / hyphens only
finance.err.account_code_charset: code may only contain uppercase letters, digits, and hyphens
finance.err.account_name_format: name is required and must be ≤ 64 chars
finance.err.tone_invalid: tone must be empty or one of {payload}
finance.err.opening_balance_invalid: opening_balance must be a finite number
finance.err.account_in_use: Account has {payload} transactions and cannot be deleted
finance.err.category_in_use: Category has {payload} transactions and cannot be deleted
finance.err.category_code_format: code must be 1..=8 chars, uppercase letters / digits / '&' only
finance.err.category_name_format: name is required and must be ≤ 32 chars
finance.err.category_sort_order_invalid: sort_order must be zero or greater
